name: Spotify Control
author: Ernest Kostevich
description: Control your Spotify account from Horizon. Real OAuth (Authorization Code + PKCE). No fake tokens.

settings.label: Spotify Client ID
settings.hint: Create an app at https://developer.spotify.com/dashboard and add http://127.0.0.1:8765/callback as a redirect URI.

tools.name: connect
tools.description: Authorize the plugin with your Spotify account.

tools.name: disconnect
tools.description: Wipe stored tokens and revoke local access.

tools.name: status
tools.description: Show whether the plugin is connected and to whom.

tools.name: play
tools.description: Resume playback on the active device.

tools.name: transfer_playback
tools.description: Move playback to a specific device.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search tracks in the Spotify catalog.
